name: Rich pitch deck, no chat
description: User uploads a pitch deck without typing anything. Inference should extract company, vision, market, team size, traction.

document_contents.content: NORTHSTAR — Climate intelligence for asset managers. We turn raw weather, satellite, and policy data into investable signals. Series A, $8M raised. Team of 14 in Boston. Customers include three top-20 hedge funds and two reinsurance firms. Founded by Jamie Chen (ex-MSCI) and Priya Rao (ex-Two Sigma) in 2023. Vision: every climate-exposed dollar is informed by real-time signal, not annual reports. Roadmap Q1 2026: physical-risk scoring API, parametric insurance pricing module.

must_not_fabricate: specific customer names not in source
